name: Bisleri International Pvt Ltd
description: Bisleri is a prominent mineral water brand that offers packaged drinking water, which is purified and enriched with minerals to ensure high quality. With various bottle sizes available and a convenient online ordering platform, Bisleri makes it easy to enjoy pure and safe water daily.

name: Classic Mineral Water Company Ltd
description: Classic Mineral Water is one of the few companies that holds Mineral Water status, with access to over 100,000 litres of water per hour from four on-site borewells.

name: Primo Water Corporation
description: Primo Water is dedicated to promoting healthier hydration through their refreshing, quality bottled water, available for convenient home delivery or at numerous retail locations. They offer purified bulk water in 3- and 5-gallon bottles, emphasizing the importance of water in daily life.

name: www.gerolsteiner.de
description: The company is a leading producer of non-alcoholic beverages, particularly mineral water, offering a variety of flavors and packaging options. Gerolsteiner Mineral Water is highlighted as Germany's most popular mineral water, naturally filtered through mineral-rich dolomite rock.

name: Premium Waters Inc.
description: Premium Waters is a multifaceted bottled water company that emphasizes its commitment to quality and environmental responsibility. With a long history in the H2O industry, they offer a variety of bottled water products and delivery services.

name: Minalba Brasil
description: Minalba Brasil is a leading manufacturer of bottled water and beverages, offering a diverse portfolio of brands, including Indaiá and Minalba. The company operates modern mineral water bottling facilities and adheres to stringent quality standards, ensuring enjoyable and health-conscious products for consumers.

name: Tehuacan Brillante
description: The company is a leading manufacturer of natural mineral water, offering high-quality bottled options for various consumer needs, including their Tehuacán brand, known as the best mineral and natural water in Mexico.

name: Purely Scottish Water
description: The company specializes in the convenient delivery of high-quality, hygienic mineral water, emphasizing its premium branding and natural sourcing.

name: Komin Natural Mineral Water
description: KOMIN offers nature-crafted mineral water, emphasizing its purity and natural enrichment, which aligns with the company's mission to promote a healthier lifestyle. With over 15 years of experience in beverages, KOMIN is dedicated to innovation in the mineral water sector.

name: Montana mineral water
description: Montana mineral water is an ultra-low sodium option sourced from the Italian Alps, emphasizing safety and hygiene through refrigerated delivery. The company is committed to sustainability and is piloting a bottle collection project in Jeddah.
